dict.string: FridgeLuck uses the camera to scan ingredients and nutrition labels.
FridgeLuck uses your photo library so you can scan ingredient photos.
FridgeLuck uses your microphone for live voice guidance and recipe assistance.
FridgeLuck reads your Apple Health nutrition totals so meal tracking stays connected from the start.
FridgeLuck saves the meals you log so your Apple Health nutrition history stays up to date.
